column1: Piercing gaze calm and unreadable

Downcast eyes then sudden upward strike
Catlike stare with elegant cruelty
Gentle gaze with steel behind it
Eyes narrowed slightly assessing the room
Sparkling eyes with jewel like catchlights
Smiling eyes with wicked certainty
Distant gaze like memory and revenge
Eyes shadowed dramatic contrast noir mood
